properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I was talking Her in Bed and it caught me by surprise When my little girl asked me what is God look like? Well I smiled and laughed a little, Lean over for a kiss I said baby I don't know, but I can tell you this:

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I've been to the ocean. I've stood on the mountain. I've seen a sunset burn away the sky of blue Stared up at the starlight, got lost in the midnight I've never seen the face of God but I've seen what he can do…

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I've thought about the wonders, around us everyday Stuff that if you'd let it, it will take your breath away I've also found his glory, shining from within. The heart of a sinner, who's just been born again.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I've been to the river, watched soul going under. Forgiveness washed them clean and mercy made them new. God needs the old man and I can tell you first step. I've never seen the face of God, but I've seen what he can do,

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Over now I don't need the picture somehow this whole world helps me, To see him clearly. Cause I've walked in the valley, cried out from sorrow I can tell you every part that he has brought me through. And I know him better, Lord I love you forever…

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I've never seen the face of god… oh… I've never seen the face of my god, but I know what he can do…. I've seen what he can do…
